title: Drive thru weed — fall 2022 cash-flow + life todos
html:
TL;DR

  • Title is a one-liner business idea: "Drive thru weed — cash flow" (later returns in 2024 12 28 ideas as "Weed + snack drive thru").
  • Followed by a junior-year fall-term todo list: classes finalized, insurance sorted, teeth whitening, contact lenses, get OSIG work done, sell MSI laptop, scar cream, etc.
  • "establish once a week talk with Emilio (weekdays)" — explicit calendar discipline for brother-call.
  • "T Fowler @voarg / Hey! It was dope seeing you. I hope to see you around!" — drafted DM to Tessa Fowler (an OSU contact / interest).
  • "Part time lover" — closes with a one-line song reference / mood note.

Key quotes

"Drive thru weed - cash flow"

"establish once a week talk with Emilio (weekdays)"

"Hey! It was dope seeing you. I hope to see you around!"

Why it matters in the graph

  • Drive-thru-weed idea is one of his earliest recurring business themes — appears here Sept 2022 and again Dec 2024 (2024 12 28 ideas). 2nd mention threshold met → could promote to a concept page if a 3rd hit lands.
  • Confirms osig involvement in fall 2022 (Oregon State Investment Group) — Yahir's brief value-investing club period.
  • Tessa Fowler — a person Yahir wanted to keep in touch with. Single mention; goes to potential entities list.

Open questions

  • Did the once-a-week Emilio call discipline stick?
  • Tessa Fowler — context still ambiguous; classmate, date interest, or mutual friend?
  • OSIG — how long was he in it? Useful for resume / value investing arc.

Wikilinks

emilio · osu · corvallis or · value investing · 2024 12 28 ideas
